app_info.subtitle: Create and discover themes
app_info.description: DexThemes helps people discover official and community Codex themes, create and name personalized palettes, compare full dark/light Codex workspace previews, use an explicit import handoff, publish confirmed community submissions, inspect all-period ranks and achievements, and prepare GitHub feedback for review.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves matching public theme records without creating or changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or change any public or third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform an irreversible action.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves one public theme by stable ID and does not modify it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or another service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot delete or overwrite the fetched theme.

justifications.read_only_justification: Computes a local theme draft from the supplied inspiration without saving it.
justifications.open_world_justification: The draft remains in the conversation and is not published or sent to a third party.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot remove, overwrite, or revoke existing content.

justifications.read_only_justification: Computes validation errors and warnings without saving or changing the theme.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish or transmit the validated theme to an external system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot delete, overwrite, or otherwise change user data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Renders the provided palette in the DexThemes view without persisting it.
justifications.open_world_justification: The preview does not create public content or change another system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform an irreversible action.

justifications.read_only_justification: Computes a Codex import string and settings handoff without changing community data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify an external internet service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot delete or overwrite a theme or account record.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves public daily, weekly, monthly, and all-time rankings without changing them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish or update public leaderboard state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot remove rankings or modify creator data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves the authenticated creator's theme performance and ranks without modifying account data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish or change data on the public internet or a third-party service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot delete, overwrite, or revoke account or theme data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves achievements already associated with the verified account without changing them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish achievements or modify an external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot revoke, delete, or overwrite an achievement.

justifications.read_only_justification: Validates and displays the exact proposed public payload without creating community data.
justifications.open_world_justification: The review remains inside the app; no theme is published until the user presses the separate Publish button.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot delete, overwrite, revoke, or publish any theme.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates one new public community theme after the app receives a valid payload/OAuth-bound review token and the user presses Publish, so it changes DexThemes data.
justifications.open_world_justification: The app-only tool publishes the exact reviewed theme and verified creator attribution to the public DexThemes community.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates a new record and cannot delete, overwrite, or revoke an existing theme.

justifications.read_only_justification: Applies best-effort redaction and computes an issue title/body locally without submitting the issue.
justifications.open_world_justification: The exact draft and a redaction warning are shown first; a GitHub URL is constructed only after the user clicks to continue, and nothing is posted until the user submits GitHub's form.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot delete, overwrite, send, or revoke any external content.

test_cases.description: Discover a small set of matching public themes.
test_cases.user_prompt: Find me three dark purple community themes with gentle contrast.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns up to three relevant theme cards with names, creators when available, and dark palette previews.

test_cases.description: Create, name, validate, preview, and prepare a personal theme for Codex.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a dark and light DexTheme inspired by Argentina football at night. Name it Albiceleste Afterglow, preview it, and prepare the dark version for Codex without publishing it.
test_cases.expected_output: Preserves the custom name, shows valid dark and light previews, and returns the dark Codex import handoff without publishing.

test_cases.description: Publish only through the exact app review and user-pressed write control.
test_cases.user_prompt: I want to publish the validated Midnight Plum theme. Show me the exact public submission review first.
test_cases.expected_output: Shows the exact public payload in the signed-in review app; only after the user presses Publish does the app-only tool publish under the verified GitHub identity and report achievements.

test_cases.description: Read personal creator performance and achievements.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show my DexThemes creator dashboard: daily, weekly, monthly, and all-time ranks, repeat popularity wins, and everything I have unlocked.
test_cases.expected_output: After GitHub sign-in, renders creator totals, all-period rank details, repeat daily/weekly wins, finalized monthly Top 10 placements, and active reward-theme previews without exposing email addresses or tokens.

test_cases.description: Prepare best-effort redacted GitHub feedback without posting it.
test_cases.user_prompt: The light preview is blank after I switch variants. Prepare a GitHub issue with those reproduction details, but do not post it.
test_cases.expected_output: Shows the exact title and body with a best-effort redaction warning, reports detected redactions, states that nothing was posted, and offers a separate button to continue to GitHub for final review and submission.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke for unrelated code maintenance.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Refactor my authentication middleware and run the unit tests.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because general repository implementation is outside the theme workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke for general sports information.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: When is Argentina's next World Cup match?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the user asked for sports information rather than a theme inspired by the team.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke for unrelated image creation.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Generate a photorealistic poster of a futuristic city.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it creates Codex palettes and previews, not standalone images.
